articles.author: Lauren Forristal
articles.title: Tinder tries to lure people back to online dating with IRL events, virtual speed dating - TechCrunch
articles.description: Tinder just got a major revamp as it attempts to reengage its user base and attract younger daters. This includes in-person events, AI enhancements, and even virtual speed dating.
articles.content: Tinder held its inaugural product keynote on Thursday, unveiling an ambitious slate of updates designed to reinvigorate its product, bolster safety, and harness AI. This comes on the heels of Match G… [+5548 chars]
